children.altText: Handwritten yellow text on a black background reads "CROUSIA DAILY WORDS 4/14/2026 Zoo Haloo! How are you doing today? I hope you are swell! I know I am! Let's talk about numbers. let's talk about theories! Let's talk about God and kings! - Jeremiah".

children.text: So I apparently lost a number of my little notes like the ones above... they HAD BEEN in my archives... but the archives lost the notes!  Oh well... they take forever to load anyways.
